rulings.Case Title: THOMAS RUBINO et al VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel R. T. Vanderbilt Company To Produce Outstanding Documents In Connection With The Deposition Of R.T. Vanderbilt Companys Person Most Knowledgeable-Custodian Of Records
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, February 9, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant R.T. Vanderbilt Company to produce documents is granted. All requested documents that defendant locates after a reasonably diligent search must be produced to plaintiffs. It does not appear that defendant opposes the motion. Defendant¿s ¿opposition¿ memorandum concludes by stating that defendant ¿is currently searching for the additional documents requested and will provide them if such documents exist¿.¿ = (220/HEK)
